user.title: Copy a dashboard
user.description: Duplicate an existing dashboard into a new one.

data.update_links: Rewrite navigation links to point at the new dashboard

error.source_not_found: The selected dashboard no longer exists.
error.url_taken: That URL path is already used by another dashboard.
error.load_failed: Could not read the source dashboard configuration.
error.create_failed: Could not create the new dashboard.
error.save_failed: The new dashboard was created but its content could not be saved.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.copy_successful: Dashboard copied to /{url}. Hard-refresh the page (Ctrl+Shift+R) to see it in the sidebar.
